title: Request for a Refugee Profile - Canada.ca
content:
## Request for a Refugee Profile
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This application includes the following items:
- Request for a Refugee Profile [IMM 5438] ( PDF , 572.45 KB )
- Use of a Representative [IMM 5476] ( PDF , 648.31 KB )
- Instruction Guide [IMM 5496]
This application is for refugee sponsors who wish to receive information on refugees they can help settle in their communities.
Use this form if you are a member of one of these groups:
- Sponsorship Agreement Holders
Note: Submitting a Request for a Refuge Profile will not commit you or your group to sponsoring a refugee. The request is for information only.
Sponsors living in the province of Quebec should contact the Ministère des Relations avec les citoyens et de l’Immigration .
Submit the application to a Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada centre. You can find the address in the application guide that comes with the application.
- Read your instruction guide and download your application forms.
- Complete, sign and date your application forms.
- Mail your fully completed application .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
